Math.round\(\(Date.now\(\) - new Date\(d.lastSeen\)\)/1000\) : null; console.log\(d.name + ' | ' + d.status + ' | ' + ago + '초 전'\); }\); }\);"; Write-Host "[$i/12] $\(Get-Date -Format 'HH:mm:ss'\) — $result"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5 })
